message.description: Required natural-language user message for pi-pi. Use this field, not text, prompt, query, or content. Empty or too-vague messages return clarification_needed rather than a protocol failure.

conversationToken.description: Optional continuation token that resumes an existing delegated pi-pi conversation. When omitted, pi-pi starts a new conversation turn.

repoDir.description: Repository or package directory that should receive the build. Defaults to the current working directory when omitted.

applyChanges.description: When true, write files to the target path and attempt target-path runtime verification. When false, keep the build in dry-run mode and still return a normal completed outcome with nested build details.

replaceExisting.description: Confirms destructive replacement when the target path already contains repo content. When omitted for brownfield targets, chat_pi_pi returns clarification_needed.
